message: feat: harden speech model recovery state

files.patch:
@@ -394,6 +394,40 @@ final class AppControllerTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [])
     }
 
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadSpeechModelRecoveryTransitionsFromErrorBackToReady() async {
+        let settings = makeSettings()
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        loader.loadErrorSequence = [
+            NSError(domain: "AppControllerTests", code: 1, userInfo: [
+                NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Model load failed."
+            ]),
+            nil
+        ]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            audioRecorder: recorder
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("Model load failed."))
+
+        await controller.loadSpeechModel(modelID: nil)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startedBindings, [.defaultBindings])
+        XCTAssertEqual(hotkeyMonitor.startInvocationCount, 1)
+    }
+
     @MainActor
     func testStartSurfacesHotkeyMonitorFailureAsError() async {
         let settings = makeSettings()

@@ -738,6 +773,12 @@ private final class AppControllerSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
 
     func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws {
         calls.append("load:\(model.id)")
+        if !loadErrorSequence.isEmpty {
+            let nextError = loadErrorSequence.removeFirst()
+            if let nextError {
+                throw nextError
+            }
+        }
         if let loadError {
             throw loadError
         }

@@ -19,6 +19,22 @@ final class SpeechModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
         )
     }
 
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadRequestLogsAttemptWhenEnteringLoading() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        var loggedModelIDs: [String] = []
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            loadAttemptLogger: { loggedModelIDs.append($0) }
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loggedModelIDs, [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id])
+    }
+
     @MainActor
     func testUnknownModelTransitionsToErrorWithoutCallingLoader() async {
         let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
@@ -196,6 +212,71 @@ final class SpeechModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertEqual(manager.errorMessage, URLError(.timedOut).localizedDescription)
         XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 1)
     }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testRefreshCachedModelIDsReportsAllCachedCatalogEntries() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id,
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.fluidParakeetV3.id
+        ]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.refreshCachedModelIDs()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            manager.cachedModelIDs,
+            [
+                SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id,
+                SpeechModelDescriptor.fluidParakeetV3.id
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testSwitchingModelsResetsSupportingRuntimesBeforeLoadingNewModel() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id,
+            SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperTinyEnglish.id
+        ]
+        let supportingRuntimeResetter = TestSupportingSpeechRuntimeResetter()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            supportingRuntimeResetter: supportingRuntimeResetter
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+        loader.calls.removeAll()
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperTinyEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(supportingRuntimeResetter.resetCallCount, 1)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testTimedOutLoadRetryResetsSupportingRuntimes() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        loader.loadErrorSequence = [URLError(.timedOut)]
+        let supportingRuntimeResetter = TestSupportingSpeechRuntimeResetter()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: SpeechModelDescriptor.catalog,
+            loader: loader,
+            supportingRuntimeResetter: supportingRuntimeResetter
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.resetCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(supportingRuntimeResetter.resetCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+    }
 }
 
 private final class TestSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
@@ -246,3 +327,11 @@ private final class TestSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
         continuation = nil
     }
 }
+
+private final class TestSupportingSpeechRuntimeResetter: SupportingSpeechRuntimeResetting {
+    private(set) var resetCallCount = 0
+
+    func resetLoadedSupportingModels() async {
+        resetCallCount += 1
+    }
+}
